nodes.name: Ashy-throated chlorospingus
nodes.summary: Ashy-throated chlorospingus（Ashy-throated chlorospingus，学名 Chlorospingus canigularis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 委內瑞拉

nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: signatus: eastern slope of Andes from northern Ecuador's Napo Province south and intermittently through Peru to northern Puno Department The ashy-throated chlorospingus inhabits lowland and tropical evergreen forest and tropical deciduous forest. It favors wet forest heavy with moss and is found mostly in the forest canopy and its edges. It ranges in elevation between in Costa Rica, between in Colombia, mostly between in western Ecuador and between in the east, mostly between in Peru but only at about in Tumbes, and between in Venezuela
